name: the-mountain-is-you
description: Brianna Wiest's The Mountain Is You — transform self-sabotage into self-mastery by uncovering the unconscious needs behind self-defeating behaviors
useCase: Helps users identify why they self-sabotage, interpret negative emotions as guidance, build emotional intelligence, release past trauma, design their future self, and achieve self-mastery through microshifts rather than breakthroughs.
knownRisks: Deep psychological excavation can surface uncomfortable emotions — users should go at their own pace
The book's framework emphasizes internal causes; users in genuinely abusive or oppressive situations may also need external support
